target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Target is a military vehicle with catastrophic structural damage; roof and chassis are completely collapsed and charred; engine compartment and interior are obliterated; no functional components remain visible.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely charred with no intact structural components; engine bay and passenger compartment are reduced to melted metal and debris; all major components are unrecognizable and unrepairable.

target_2.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is unrecognizable with no intact major components; chassis and body are severely melted and fragmented; consistent with catastrophic K-kill damage.

summary: Three military vehicles are assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence, all showing catastrophic structural collapse, charred remains, and obliterated components. The scene depicts a roadside area with multiple severely damaged vehicles and soldiers in uniform standing nearby, indicating a recent destructive event. The functional impact is likely complete loss of operational capability for all assessed targets.
